---
name: Component Request
about: Request a new component or an addition to an existing one
title: "[Component Request] "
labels: component-request
assignees: ''
---

## Component Name
What should this component be called?

## Category
Which category does it belong to?
- [ ] Inputs & Actions
- [ ] Display
- [ ] Layout
- [ ] Feedback
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Charts & Graphs

## Use Case
Describe the specific product scenario where this component is needed. The more concrete the better, include the team, the screen, and the user action.

## Proposed Variants / Props
List the key variants or configuration options you'd expect (e.g. size: sm | md | lg, variant: default | destructive).

## Existing Reference
Is there an existing component in another system (shadcn, Base UI, Radix, MUI) that's close? Link it if so.

## Figma
Is there an existing Figma design for this component? Link the frame or component node if so.

## Priority
- [ ] Blocking, can't ship without it
- [ ] High, needed in current sprint
- [ ] Medium, nice to have soon
- [ ] Low, future consideration

## Additional Context
Any other notes, constraints, or accessibility requirements.
